clawscan_note: Uses Chrome CDP for authenticated scraping, Lexiang MCP APIs, yt-dlp/Whisper for transcription. Requires lexiang MCP connector.
pr_description:
## fetch-archive-to-lexiang

Universal web article fetcher and archiver for AI agents.

**Features:**
- Bypass paywalls (Substack, Medium, 知识星球, Weibo)
- YouTube download + Whisper transcription
- Podcast audio + transcription
- PDF extraction + bilingual translation
- Archive to Lexiang knowledge base
